findings.detail: Side-by-side panels render cleanly in LR layout with TB subgraphs. Both panels have equal height and balanced whitespace. All color tiers correct: start=blue, auto=purple, hitl=yellow thick-border, act=blue, done=green, ghost=no-border purple text. Subtitles legible at 12px. No overlapping nodes, no label truncation, no cross-edge collisions.
